body_txt: Finding good help is hard, especially hard if you're a villain. No matter how fearsome a villain appears, it seems they are often Surrounded by Idiots . All their Mooks are hopeless bunglers, with one exception — the Token Competent Minion. The Token Competent Minion is the one evil lackey who consistently gets results. They rarely, if ever fail and are likely to be the villain's favorite because of this. They are most likely to be The Dragon , but they can still be in the rank-and-file and still get consistent results . If the boss is incompetent too, the Token Competent Minion might also be a Hyper-Competent Sidekick . Some examples may end up becoming The Starscream or a Dragon Ascendant . If this minion is killed off or defects , the villain faction's threat level will drop significantly unless the TCM is replaced or the other minions seriously step up their game . See also Only Sane Employee and Elite Mooks . Contrast Minion with an F in Evil .
